return(function(...)local U,i do local g,J,P,h,Q=math.floor,string.char,string.byte,tonumber,string.sub local function L(U,i)local J=0 for P=0,7,1 do local h=U/2+i/2 if h~=g(h)then J=J+2^P end U=g(U/2)i=g(i/2)end return J end local z,H="iiihhhiiiiihssss","\n\129\137\003\b\209\174\183\182\194\169\192\205\197\186\014\149\147\199\248\000\000\001\000\000\001\a\000\000\000__index\006\000\000\000__call\005\000\000\000__mod\005\000\000\000__mul"local b=65 local I=773 local F=true local function j(U)local g={}for i=0,3,1 do local J=i*2+1 local F=Q(U,J,J+1)local j=h(F,16)local k=((j-I)+256)%256 local D=P(z,i%16+1)local R=P(H,i%b+1)g[i+1]=L(L(k,D),R)end local j=((g[1]+g[2]*256)+g[3]*65536)+g[4]*16777216 local k={}local D=9 for i=1,j,1 do local g if F and i%2==0 then g=Q(U,D+1,D+1)..Q(U,D,D)else g=Q(U,D,D+1)end local j=h(g,16)local R=((j-I)+256)%256 local u=(i-1)%16+1 local Z=(i-1)%b+1 local G=P(z,u)local f=P(H,Z)k[i]=J(L(L(R,G),f))D=D+2 end return table.concat(k)end local k={{435;"78EDE57026E888500C0DAD0BB64D88CCD7EDC035"};{8950;"6FEDE57019C8975018ECAB2CBF"},{"6CEDE57029E89231";1630};{"69EDE5702B398B31082DB9";7227},{"69EDE5703C6888500A2DB9",7228},{5793;"72EDE5702A6893412B5DBA2BB0DEAD6CD77D"},{"6AEDE57025C8919017F8";6749},{4070,"6DEDE57098C7739F452FB32CB93DB9"},{"69EDE5700AF994B037308A";7229},{1631;"6CEDE5701C299D42"};{"69EDE570071994E1131EA7";7230},{"65EDE570092A8E",7466},{"72EDE57009A8DEB0583EBA4C9FDEAB30D73D",5794};{"6BEDE57038E8934218",9189},{7467,"65EDE5702F0AA6"},{1632,"6CEDE57032E89231"},{"75EDE570270999701B1E8B0BB09C8BECD10E8971974ADC";3114},{"74EDE5700D2987725D7DB78B927F8D7F",674};{5795;"72EDE5703E7BB2F0555FA41A9DFF8DBEF89C"},{1633;"6CEDE5702A689731"},{675,"74EDE570127AAAF55A00B16BA3DC8A40"},{7231;"69EDE57032299912140DB1"},{3353;"71EDE570352997220A0D99FAC34EB86ECF8DA9"};{"6FEDE5702CE899F045EEB35BBD";8951};{"6CEDE5701CE89850",1634},{9190,"6BEDE57015D9861213"},{"72EDE5700F1EDA713F8DBCCEB0CEF800901E",5796},{"6CEDE57009E89231";1635},{676,"74EDE5703C4A8A3113FEA71BAE7CA82D"},{"6EEDE570292999D30A0DB6CBC13D",6510};{"6EEDE570362A93D30A0DB6CBC13D";6511};{7994;"77EDE570362995C00EFDABFABF4D981ED69CADF19E"};{"6FEDE57039C8975018ECAB2CBF";8952};{913;"70EDE5702FB8984206CDA90C"};{7468;"65EDE57012299C"};{"6FEDE570350997310ACD850BBB",8953},{7232;"69EDE57025C897312C1DB3"},{"73EDE570272A999027BDB75BC13DA420FC";8233};{436,"78EDE570272A99904500AD0BB6DCAA79A3EF9404"},{1636;"6CEDE5702BB89AB0"},{6512;"6EEDE5703C299D42271DB8FAB5AC"},{"6CEDE5703C299D42";1637},{1638;"6CEDE5702AC89342"},{6513;"6EEDE57029C89980069D8A6BB84D"};{"70EDE5703C299D42385DC20C";914},{6514,"6EEDE5703C299D4228BDB06BB2D9"};{2397;"7AEDE57026E888500C0DAD0BB64D99FDE4DDBF21A2D8D0301061"},{"6CEDE57035689F31",1639},{"6BEDE5703B1B8EB057";9191},{"70EDE57038C89870195DAD5B";915},{"6CEDE5703B1B8EB0";1640};{6750,"6AEDE570270999701B1E"};{8954;"6FEDE5702CF986110CDDAA7BBF"};{"70EDE5703B6AA89017CDA71B";916},{7995;"77EDE57033C89AD10A00B7FAB09CB3E902FDA5329C"},{"74EDE57025C897A00A0D9A4CC07CBA0E",677},{ D={}i=setmetatable({},{__index=function(U,i)return D[i]end;__call=function(U,i)return D[i]end;__mod=function(U,i)return D[i]end;__mul=function(U,i)return D[i]end,__metatable=false})function U(i)local g=D if not g[i]then for U=1,#k,1 do local J=k[U]local P=type(J[1])=="number"and J[1]or J[2]if P==i then local U=type(J[1])=="string"and J[1]or J[2]g[i]=j(U)break end end end return i end end return(function(g,P,h,Q,L,z,H,u,T,J,n,F,A,X,R,d,D,Z,j,I,k,K,G,b,f)T,F,R,j,J,Z,n,u,K,d,G,f,A,b,I,k,X,D=function(U,i)local g=k(i)local P=function(P,h,Q,L,z,H)return J(U,{P;h,Q;L,z;H},i,g)end return P end,function()j=j+1 I[j]=1 return j end,function(U)I[U]=I[U]-1 if I[U]==0 then I[U],b[U]=nil,nil end end,0,function(J,h,Q,L)local Gm={}local zm,jm,W,j,a,E,Rm,t,e,Y,um,I,N,km,o,Fm,k,bm,q,Lm,hm,y,m,Zm,fm,x,v,S,Hm,l,gm,w,c,Dm,O,s,V,H,Um,Im,M,r,B,C,Jm,im,Qm,p,D,Pm while J do if J<8427225 then if J<4055781 then if J<2059825 then if J<1084405 then if J<620250 then if J<267760 then if J<103208 then if J<48179 then if J<29057 then if J<23454 then if J<7345 then w=0 l=k>=w e=J J=l and 14069476 or 14931031 m=l else W=b[Q[1]]J=i[U(435)]w=e t=8 C=w/t S=W(I,C)w=nil q[J]=S q=nil J=756894 end else e=i[U(8950)]m=g[e]e=i[U(1630)]D=m[e]m=i[U(7227)]k=D[m]m=i[U(7228)]D=i[U(5793)]D=k[D]J=10910661 D=D(k,m)I=D end else if J<36544 then if J<31731 then
